questions.question: A rhythm pattern has $3$ repeats in $12$ beats. What is the rate of repeats per beat?
If a painter can finish a $16$ ft by $20$ ft canvas in $8$ hours, how many hours to finish a $12$ ft by $15$ ft canvas at the same rate?
The frequency of a sound wave is $250$ Hz. How many cycles per second is this sound wave?
A music school has $18$ teachers. If the student-to-teacher ratio is $12:1$, how many students are there in total?
The length of a song is $4$ minutes and $15$ seconds. If this song is played $3$ times in a row, what is the total time in seconds?
An art piece has a width that is $2$ times its height. If the width is $12$ ft, what is the area of the art piece in square feet?
If $x$ is inversely proportional to $y$, and $y = 4$ when $x = 3$, what is the value of $y$ when $x = 2$?
A painter works at a rate of $2$ walls per $5$ hours. How many hours will it take to paint $12$ walls at this rate?
A sound wave has a frequency of $x$ Hz. If the time period is $2$ seconds, find the value of $x$ and explain the relationship between frequency and time period.

The cost of recording a song is $$200$ plus $$50$ per hour of studio time. If $x$ is the number of hours of studio time, write an equation to represent the total cost and graph the equation with $x$ on the horizontal axis and cost on the vertical axis.

teacher_rules: Please ensure students have the necessary calculators and tools for the test.
Remind students that they must show all work for free response questions.
Emphasize that all answers should be clearly labeled and easy to read.
